steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the longer a species has been extinct, the less likely a suitable habitat remains, so we need the candidate that has been extinct the longest.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C notes the woolly mammoth went extinct several thousand years before the saber‑toothed cat, indicating it has been extinct longer than any other option.
The other three either describe species that died out much more recently (passenger pigeon, Caribbean monk seal) or are younger than the mammoth (saber‑toothed cat).
That matches choice C — C is correct.
